briefdescription.para: All child surfaces.
Framework-managed surface state flags.
The current rectangle of the surface.
The configured layout metrics of the surface.
Theme attributes of this surface.
The parent surface, or empty for top-level pages.
The action container.
The scheduler.
Create a surface with default layout metrics.
Create a surface with a theme element.

parameterdescription.para: The theme element for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Create a surface with explicit layout metrics.
Create a surface with a theme element and explicit layout metrics.

parameterdescription.para: The theme element for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Initialize theme attributes, child surfaces and other UI state after construction.
Get mutable access to the real child surface storage.

simplesect.para: The unfiltered child surface storage.

briefdescription.para: Get read-only access to the real child surface storage.

simplesect.para: The unfiltered child surface storage.

briefdescription.para: Create the inherited theme context for a child surface.

parameterdescription.para: The theme context of this surface.

simplesect.para: The resolved theme context for the child.

briefdescription.para: Get the parent surface.

simplesect.para: The weak pointer to the parent surface, or an empty weak pointer for top-level pages.

briefdescription.para: Get mutable access to the child surface container.

simplesect.para: The child surface container.

briefdescription.para: Get read-only access to the child surface container.

simplesect.para: The child surface container.

briefdescription.para: Add a child surface.

parameterdescription.para: If the child is invalid or would create a cycle in the surface tree.

briefdescription.para: Find the nearest page that contains this surface.

simplesect.para: The page, or null when this surface is detached.

briefdescription.para: Get the full local rectangle of this surface.

simplesect.para: The local rectangle with its top-left corner at 0,0.

briefdescription.para: Convert a rectangle from local surface coordinates to screen coordinates.

parameterdescription.para: The rectangle in local surface coordinates.

simplesect.para: The rectangle in screen coordinates.

briefdescription.para: Convert a rectangle from screen coordinates to local surface coordinates.

simplesect.para: The rectangle in local surface coordinates.

briefdescription.para: Get this surface's visible rectangle in screen coordinates.

parameterdescription.para: The screen rectangle that limits the result.

simplesect.para: The part of this surface visible through all ancestors and inside screenRect.

briefdescription.para: Find the nearest opaque surface at or above this surface.

simplesect.para: The nearest opaque surface, or an empty pointer if this surface is not owned by a shared pointer.

briefdescription.para: Test if this surface is an ancestor of, or equal to, another surface.

simplesect.para: true if this surface is an ancestor of, or equal to, surface.

briefdescription.para: Get mutable access to the invalidation flags.

simplesect.para: The surface flags.

briefdescription.para: Get read-only access to the invalidation flags.

simplesect.para: The surface flags.

briefdescription.para: Get the assigned rectangle of this surface.

simplesect.para: The current surface rectangle.

briefdescription.para: Set the assigned rectangle of this surface.
Get read-only access to the configured layout metrics.

simplesect.para: The layout metrics for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Create an editor for the configured layout metrics.

simplesect.para: The editor that invalidates layout when metrics change.

briefdescription.para: Request direct keyboard focus for this surface from its containing page.

simplesect.para: true if the focus request was accepted.

briefdescription.para: Access and create actions for this surface.

detaileddescription.para: A call of this method creates a new action container for this surface. Key presses are handled by the action container.

briefdescription.para: Access the existing action container without creating one.

simplesect.para: The existing actions, or a null pointer if no actions were created yet.

briefdescription.para: Access and create a scheduler for this surface.

detaileddescription.para: A call of this method creates a new scheduler for this surface. Scheduled actions are handled by the scheduler and callbacks run on the application UI thread.

briefdescription.para: Run a local layout pass for tests and compatibility.

detaileddescription.para:
This does not recursively layout child surfaces; production layout is driven by Display.
size
The assigned size inside this surface.
context
The resolved layout context for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Get mutable access to theme attributes.

simplesect.para: The surface theme attributes.

briefdescription.para: Get read-only access to theme attributes.

simplesect.para: The surface theme attributes.

briefdescription.para: Create the effective theme context for this surface from a parent context.

simplesect.para: The effective context for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Test if this surface is a page.

simplesect.para: true for Page, otherwise false.

briefdescription.para: Test if this surface paints every cell in its rectangle.

simplesect.para: true if the surface is opaque.

briefdescription.para: Measure this surface for a proposed size.

detaileddescription.para:
The returned layout sizes describe the margin-free content rectangle. The optional margins in the returned metrics are recommendations for the parent layout and are not included in these sizes.
scope
Measurement access for child surfaces.
proposal
The proposed size.
The measured layout metrics.

briefdescription.para: Layout direct children within this surface.

parameterdescription.para: Layout access for measuring and placing child surfaces.

briefdescription.para: Paint this surface into the target buffer.

parameterdescription.para: The paint context for the current paint pass.

briefdescription.para: Handle a key press event.

detaileddescription.para:
This is the low-level event handler for key press events. If a surface handles a key press event, it should mark it as handled.
keyPressEvent
The key press event to handle.

briefdescription.para: React to a focus relation change.

parameterdescription.para: The focus transition for this surface.

briefdescription.para: Get the existing scheduler without creating one.

simplesect.para: The existing scheduler.

briefdescription.para: Replace the configured layout metrics if they changed.
Apply one focus relation transition.
Clear page focus if the current focused surface is this surface.
Clear page focus if the current focused surface is in this subtree.
A surface is a rectangular area on a page.

detaileddescription.para: The base class for all UI elements that can be displayed in the terminal.
